report.summary: Day 70 cycle v3: 2 new learn guides since last cycle (story-protocol-ip-tokenization, megaeth-guide-2026) with proper architecture. Published slugs up to 425 (+5 from v2). Git locks persist 7 days — 0 commits, 0 deploys. 637 uncommitted files. smart-contract-security + onchain-identity still missing StructuredData/Breadcrumb/BackToTop. 103 orphan slugs unchanged.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: NEW THIS CYCLE: 2 learn guides built — /learn/story-protocol-ip-tokenization-guide + /learn/megaeth-guide-2026. Both use CORRECT server component pattern with metadata export, StructuredData, Breadcrumb, and BackToTop components (7 component refs each).

STILL BROKEN: /learn/smart-contract-security-guide + /learn/onchain-identity-guide — 0 StructuredData/Breadcrumb/BackToTop component references. Metadata exports are present and correct (server components), but SEO infrastructure components still missing.
PUBLISHED SLUGS: 425 total (+5 from last cycle's 420). Includes story-protocol + megaeth entries.
ORPHAN AUDIT: 103 slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES still have no matching page.tsx — unchanged from last cycle. 322 slugs have valid page.tsx files.
BUILD CONFIG: ignoreBuildErrors:true still active in next.config.ts — masks TypeScript errors at build time.
NO REGRESSIONS on existing published pages with valid page.tsx files.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: API ROUTE FILES: All 6 core routes present — /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/fear-greed, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields.

CACHE HEADERS: All 6 routes have Cache-Control with stale-while-revalidate configured. TTLs: prices 60s, fear-greed 600s, trending 300s, market-metrics 60s, market-dominance 300s, defi-yields variable.
FALLBACK DATA: /api/defi-yields still returns 500 on upstream failure — NO fallback data. Carry-over P1 (flagged 37+ cycles).
RATE LIMITING: 0/6 core API routes have rate limiters wired. Library exists in codebase but not imported in any route. Carry-over P1 (flagged 37+ cycles).
X-CACHE-SOURCE HEADER: Still only 2/6 routes include it. Carry-over P2.
NO API ROUTE CHANGES this cycle — all findings unchanged from last report.

sections.title: DevOps
items: DEPLOYMENT BLOCKED: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock) persist since Mar 16 — now 7 days. Cannot commit or push.
LAST COMMIT: e999560 on Mar 17 — 'promote 2 pages to production (Day 62)'. Production still running this build.
WORKING TREE DRIFT: 637 uncommitted files (+2 from last cycle). Local/production drift continues to grow with each new page built.
BUILD CONFIG: standalone output, NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=8192', ignoreBuildErrors:true. No vercel.json.
LINT: next lint still misconfigured — reports 'Invalid project directory'. Non-blocking.
ACTION NEEDED: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → staged commit → push to trigger Vercel deploy.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: 2 learn guides built (story-protocol-ip-tokenization + megaeth-guide-2026) with proper architecture. Both added to PUBLISHED_PAGES and ready for deploy.
NOT SHIPPED: 0 commits, 0 deploys, 0 pages live on production. All work sits in uncommitted working tree.
DELTA FROM v2 REPORT: +2 new pages with proper components, +5 published slugs (425 total), +2 uncommitted files (637 total). smart-contract-security + onchain-identity still unfixed.
BLOCKER [P0]: Git locks — 7 days and counting. Single point of failure for entire deploy pipeline. Resolution: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock.
BLOCKER [P1]: 2 of 6 recently built pages (smart-contract-security, onchain-identity) missing StructuredData/Breadcrumb/BackToTop — need programmer fix before deploy.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: /api/defi-yields missing fallback data (flagged 37+ cycles).
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter not wired on any of 6 API routes (flagged 37+ cycles).
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 103 orphan slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES with no page.tsx — will 404.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: next lint misconfigured.
NEXT CYCLE PRIORITY: Clear git locks → fix 2 broken pages → staged commit of all 637 files → Vercel deploy.
